examples: Sam: Marsha, should I call you Dr. Fieldstone?
So you know anyone who works for someone named Dr. Marsha Fieldstone ?
Dr Marsha: Hello, Sam. This is Dr. Marsha Fieldstone on Network America.
But for all his warning and preparation she could not believe the moment had come to leave Fieldstone.
In another case, I took a shot of a bush about 8 feet in front of a fieldstone wall.
